pricing_model: Pay-Per-Application (PPA/CPA) primary; CPC available for some roles
cpa_range: $15-$25 per application (varies by job title, industry, geography)
min_budget: $5/day minimum; typical small business spend $150-$300/month per post
free_tier: Free basic job posting available but with very limited reach; only sponsored posts get significant visibility
notes: Indeed transitioned from CPC to Pay-Per-Application (PPA) model in 2022. CPC is automatically applied when system lacks data on a role. Metro markets inflate CPC up to 300% vs rural. January hiring spikes push rates 15-20% higher. Agencies can negotiate flat monthly retainers for ~12% CPC discount. Clear job titles lower cost 10-30%.

pricing_model: CPC (auction-based) for promoted job posts; contract options available

cpc_range.overall: $1.50-$6.00 for job posts; $5.26 average across all ad types

cpa_range: $1.00-$8.00 per applicant (US average ~$2.83); ~$161 ad spend per hire (~57 applicants needed)
min_budget: $10/day or $100 lifetime minimum; $2.00 minimum bid; recommended $1,000-$3,000/month for meaningful optimization
free_tier: Free basic job posting available (appears in search and network connections); promoted posts start at $7-$10/day

subscription_plans.name: Self-Serve Promoted Posts
subscription_plans.features: Pushed to top of search results and job alerts

notes: LinkedIn is the most expensive major job board by CPC. Pricing varies by location (Americas ~$1.70 avg vs EMEA ~$5.00 avg), seniority, and competition. CPC fluctuates daily based on marketplace activity. Pricing factors include job location, title, and competing posts. Best for senior/specialized roles. Contact sales for contract pricing.

pricing_model: No direct job posting; jobs appear via Indeed sponsored posts. Employer branding sold separately.

cpc_range.overall: $5-$150 (historical PPC model, now routed through Indeed)

cpa_range: N/A (job applications routed through Indeed's PPA model)
min_budget: No standalone minimum; requires Indeed sponsored post for job visibility on Glassdoor
free_tier: Free company profile claiming and review management; free job posts via Indeed do NOT appear on Glassdoor

subscription_plans.name: Employer Branding (Professional/Standard)
subscription_plans.features: Enhanced company profile, analytics, employer branding tools

subscription_plans.name: Sponsored Job Posts (historical/legacy)
subscription_plans.features: Individual job promotion (now largely replaced by Indeed integration)

subscription_plans.name: Enterprise Employer Branding
subscription_plans.features: Full branding hub, dedicated support, ~10% annual price increases reported

notes: Since partnering with Indeed, Glassdoor no longer offers direct job posting. Only Indeed paid/sponsored jobs appear on Glassdoor. Glassdoor's own paid products now focus on employer branding rather than job distribution. For job advertising on Glassdoor, budget through Indeed.

cpa_range: Not explicitly published; varies by role and market
min_budget: $8/day minimum for Standard plan; $10 initial setup fee (credited as 10 Monster Credits)
free_tier: One free job posting every 30 days, limited to 3 applicants; basic exposure on Monster website and app

subscription_plans.name: Monster Free
subscription_plans.features: 1 job per 30 days, max 3 applicants, basic exposure

subscription_plans.name: Monster+ Standard
subscription_plans.features: CPC-based, distribution across Monster + CareerBuilder + partner network, set daily budget, pause anytime

subscription_plans.name: Monster+ Pro
subscription_plans.features: 299 monthly credits (1 credit = $1), unlimited user access, resume search, candidate messaging, promoted postings

subscription_plans.name: Enterprise
subscription_plans.features: Dedicated support, ATS integration, volume-based pricing

notes: Monster distributes jobs across Monster, CareerBuilder, and partner networks. Daily budgets function as average spend over 30 days. Credits expire monthly. Monster trails Indeed and ZipRecruiter on reach and matching accuracy but offers structured tiered plans.

cpc_range.overall: Not CPC-based; subscription per job slot

cpa_range: Not explicitly published; included in subscription cost
min_budget: $24/day for daily posting option; ~$399/month for Standard plan
free_tier: 4-day free trial for new employers; no permanent free tier

subscription_plans.name: Standard
subscription_plans.features: Smart dashboard, distribution to 100+ job sites, AI candidate matching

subscription_plans.name: Premium
subscription_plans.features: Everything in Standard + access to 43M+ resume database, up to 6x more candidates

subscription_plans.name: Pro
subscription_plans.features: Everything in Premium + TrafficBoost for urgent/hard-to-fill roles, ATS integrations

notes: ZipRecruiter does not publicly list exact pricing; plans are customized per company. Prices above are estimates from third-party sources. Job slot model means filled positions can be swapped for new openings without extra cost. Annual commitments may offer savings. Some users report unexpected charges after the 4-day trial. Pricing varies by location, company size, and hiring needs.

_metadata.description: Job board advertiser pricing data scraped for recruitment media plan generator
_metadata.data_freshness: Pricing data reflects 2025-2026 rates from official pages and third-party reviews
caveats: Indeed and Glassdoor blocked direct scraping; data sourced from web search and third-party reviews
ZipRecruiter does not publish exact pricing; figures are estimates
LinkedIn pricing is auction-based and highly variable
All rates are USD unless noted
Rates change frequently based on market conditions
